note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: OTLP exporter; optional headers (e.g., Authorization) when shipping to a gated collector. Local collector typically unauthenticated.

expectedFailureResponseShape.http: 400 Bad Request OR 503 when collector unavailable

commonIntegrationFailure: Exporter connection refused when no collector is listening on 4317/4318; protocol mismatch (sending OTLP/HTTP JSON to the gRPC port); silent data loss if the exporter is fire-and-forget without retry.
preventionRule: Match exporter protocol to the collector port (4318 HTTP vs 4317 gRPC); make telemetry export non-blocking and best-effort so the app never stalls when the collector is down.
